calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-19-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Appearances:
221 7th Street LLC., Plaintiff present by Dipak Patel the authorized member and with counsel; Bruce Burge.
Chad Salamh, Defendant present in pro per.
Parties met the chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at 221 7th Street , San Francisco. Back rent in the amount of $2,384.66 through June 18, 2003 and daily damages of $13.97, stayed of execution.
If the defendant vacates the premises on or before 12:00 PM., July 15, 2003, then $700.00 in form of business check will be given to the defendant and plaintiff to dismissed with prejudice. Each party waives claim against the other. Each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees. Any items left in the premises will be disposed of. No one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession. Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture.
If defendant did not comply with the agreement, plaintiff may so state by ex parte declaration and have judgment entered.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
